# iru_self_service_categories (Data Source)

Look up Iru Self Service categories, optionally filtered by name. Use the returned `id` for `self_service_category_id` on scripts and apps.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iru_self_service_categories" "utilities" {
  name = "Utilities"
}

# Reference the resolved category ID, e.g. on a self-service script:
#   self_service_category_id = one(data.iru_self_service_categories.utilities.results).id
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) If set, only categories whose name exactly matches are returned.

### Read-Only

- `results` (Attributes List) Matching Self Service categories. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results))

<a id="nestedatt--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `results`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Category ID.
- `name` (String) Category name.
